---
title: "Exploring the chemical space of antiparasitic peptides and discovery of new promising leads through a novel approach based on network science and similarity searching"
description: | 
  This oral presentation was part of the International Society for Computational Biology Student Council Webinar Series 2022, held online.
date: "2022-05-26"
image: ISCBSC_Webinarseries_2022.png
categories:
  - 👨‍🏫Oral presentation 
  - 💊Drug discovery
  - 🕸️Network science
  - 🧬Bioinformatics
---
[{{< fa calendar-check >}} Event][event]{.btn target=_blank} 
[{{< fa play-circle >}} Oral presentation (English)][oral-present]{.btn target=_blank} 
[{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill>}} Slides (English)][slides]{.btn target=_blank} 

You can find more details about this project [here][amps-nets]. 

[amps-nets]: ../../projects/APPs_networks/
[event]: http://webinars.iscbsc.org/who-we-are/
[oral-present]: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cpcXCdlG1F4
[slides]: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6582881
